pr.title: WIP: 1.1xxx BPB - MDL-T Stack (LeakyReLU² + EMA + GPTQ-lite + LateQAT + warmdown3500 + int6+zstd-22)

output.summary: Stacks MDL-T regularization that steers weights toward int6 gridpoints with EMA, LeakyReLU², extended warmdown, GPTQ-lite clipping, and Late QAT before zstd-22 compression.
techniques: - MDL-T regularizer normalizes quantization noise to nudge weights toward int6 gridpoints during warmdown
- Late QAT with GPTQ-lite clip search on EMA-smoothed weights for final quantization-aware convergence
- LeakyReLU(0.5)² activations paired with stretched warmdown to support compressible representations
